name: rag-platform
description: Full-stack Retrieval Augmented Generation platform with NestJS, Next.js, PostgreSQL, pgvector and observability tooling.

scripts.build:packages: npm --prefix packages/types run build && npm --prefix packages/contracts run build && npm --prefix packages/shared run build && npm --prefix packages/config run build && npm --prefix packages/observability run build && npm --prefix packages/sdk run build && npm --prefix packages/utils run build
scripts.ci: npm run build:packages && npm run test:packages && npm run lint:api && npm run test:api && npm run test:e2e:api && npm run coverage:api && npm run build:api && npm run test:orchestrator && npm run coverage:orchestrator && npm run build:orchestrator && npm run lint:web && npm run test:web && npm run coverage:web && npm run build:web

author: Cicero + Codex
